intro: Houstonia correllii, also known as Correll's bluet, is a rare species of flowering plant in the gentian family, characterized by its small blue flowers and narrow, lance-shaped leaves. The health benefits of Correll's bluet include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
